name: fix-validation-accuracy-placeholder
description: Fix hardcoded 0.0 accuracy placeholders in validation loop methods by wiring real AccuracyMetric accumulation per batch. Use when: (1) a validation/evaluation loop calls update_val_metrics with a literal 0.0 for accuracy, (2) a subset validation method lacks AccuracyMetric accumulation while the full validation method already has it, (3) a follow-up bug mirrors a previously fixed bug in a sibling method.
